top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for May 22, 2026
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.2% as of 7:50 a.m. in New York, with stocks heading toward their longest streak of weekly gains since 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Air Force dubs MQ-9 the ‘MVP’ of Epic Fury as lawmakers press manned-unmanned future
top_signals.summary: The remotely piloted MQ-9 Reaper was the workhorse in the U.S. air campaign against Iran, Air Force leaders told Congress on May 20.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index climbs to 2991 up 27 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Friday, May 22 2026, the Baltic Dry Index climbed 27 points, reaching 2991 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry hit ...
